case_title: 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC VS. JOSEFINO PANALIGAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANALIGAN, JOSEFINO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 508 LARKIN STREET, APARTMENT #509, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS**
DECLARATION OF LOST LEASE BY EDWARD C. SINGER, JR., ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PANALIGAN, JOSEFINO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC SERVED MAR-09-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PANALIGAN, JOSEFINO
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PANALIGAN, JOSEFINO

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED ORDER ALLOWING TO POST AND MAIL, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A, LLC SERVED MAR-09-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT PANALIGAN, JOSEFINO
ORDER FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS OF UNLAWFUL DETAINER BY POSTING AND MAILING TO THE SUBJECT PREMISES
